g.text: Memory trick: O = at most Omega = at least Theta = exactly

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Like a wallet: O = I have at most $100 Omega = I have at least $10 Theta = I have exactly $50
